text: I feel awash in the blurry boundary between self and collective, moved by the mantra that pulses through the space. In the minimalist room, warm light and soft seating create a sense of unity, yet the emptiness hints at anticipation—waiting for others, or for meaning, to fill the space. In the vivid exhibit, bright colors and glowing screens celebrate both individual and collective intelligence, making me question where "I" end and "we" begin. I am part of the swirling thoughts of innovation and research—a singular observer swept into the tide of a greater consciousness. There is an undertone of belonging, yet also a slight anxiety in dissolving into the whole.
